Package 03

SEO Optimization Packages

Rank higher, get found faster, and grow organic traffic with proven SEO strategies.

Starter

Starter SEO

R3,500 / month

Best for small businesses or new websites.

  • Basic SEO audit
  • Keyword research (5–10 keywords)
  • On-page optimization (up to 5 pages)
  • Meta titles & descriptions
  • Google indexing check
  • Basic technical fixes
  • Monthly SEO report
⏱ Estimated: 6–10 hours / month

Growth

Growth SEO

R7,000 / month

For businesses that want steady traffic growth.

  • Full SEO audit
  • Keyword research (15–25 keywords)
  • On-page optimization (10–15 pages)
  • 2 SEO blog posts per month
  • Internal linking optimization
  • Technical SEO improvements
  • Basic backlink outreach
  • Competitor analysis
  • Monthly performance report
⏱ Estimated: 15–20 hours / month

Professional SEO

R12,000 / month

  • Technical SEO management
